gaps.description: sense.js not implemented — no face/gesture/object detection (M5 DBB-001~004)
memory.js not implemented — no vector memory search (M5 DBB-005~008)
Test coverage < 98% — M5 DBB-013 not met
/api/chat tool_use response format uses 'content' type instead of 'text' type (M4 DBB-008/009)
/admin panel data sourced from static files, not live /api/status and /api/config (M3)
store.js exports del() but DBB expects delete() — naming mismatch (M4 DBB-004)
SIGINT graceful shutdown not explicitly handled in CLI entry point (M5 DBB-012)
CDN URL in profiles.js differs from DBB spec (cdn.jsdelivr.net vs cdn.example.com)
Model download progress display (% + speed) not fully implemented in optimizer.js (M1)
